text.p: Adelaide Metropolitan, Mount Lofty Ranges and Murraylands districts.
The State Emergency Service advises that people should:
* Keep clear of fallen power lines.
* Beware of fallen trees or debris on the road.
* Don't drive, ride or walk through flood water.
* Keep clear of creeks and storm drains.

Check https://www.bom.gov.au/weather-and-climate/warnings-and-alerts. Warnings are also available through TV and Radio broadcasts or call 1300 659 210. The Bureau and State Emergency Service would appreciate warnings being broadcast regularly.
Weather Situation: A line of heavy showers has eased about Adelaide and the hills.
This warning is now cancelled. A Severe Weather Warning is current for parts of South Australia. Please check https://www.bom.gov.au/weather-and-climate/warnings-and-alerts/
20.8 mm was recorded at Crafers West in the 30 minutes to 11:47 am.

hazard.text: Adelaide Metropolitan, Mount Lofty Ranges and Murraylands

text.p: This warning is now cancelled. A Severe Weather Warning is current for parts of South Australia. Please check https://www.bom.gov.au/weather-and-climate/warnings-and-alerts/
20.8 mm was recorded at Crafers West in the 30 minutes to 11:47 am.
